name: Shadow Copies Deletion
notes: This rule triggers when deletion of shadow copies is detected.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches "Command" IMATCHES '(.*vssadmin.exe\s*Delete\s*Shadows.*)|(wmic\.exe.*shadowcopy\s*delete.*)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Shadow Copies Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches "Command" IMATCHES '(.*vssadmin.exe\s*Delete\s*Shadows.*)|(wmic\.exe.*shadowcopy\s*delete.*)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Shadow Copies Delete Detected
Event description: Shadow Copies Delete Detected
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
